stemHtml: In normal flight operations, what is the correct position of the bleed air switches?

options.a: Both engine bleed switches ON; APU bleed switch ON.
options.b: Both engine bleed switches ON; APU bleed switch OFF.
options.c: One engine bleed switch ON, One engine bleed switch OFF; APU bleed switch OFF.
options.d: Both engine bleed switches OFF; APU bleed switch ON.
